raw_consumer_statement:
TO : XXXX XXXX, XXXX, or XXXX. XXXX XXXX. 

I have escalated the request for a full refund for the ticket I purchased and was canceled by XXXX XXXX, with my contact at XXXX XXXX services. 

As I have written documentation that I would receive a full refund as I could not travel for XXXX  and XXXX government issues, the insurance and the reassurance give us adequate cause to escalate these long-overdue requests. 

Please know that this course of action is distasteful to our XXXX, though now unavoidable. 

XXXX confirmed that someone other than myself DID receive my refund, but it was not my company or myself. ( XX/XX/XXXX request for refund was made ) and total balance was distributed ( unlawfully in the amount of {$97.00} to XXXX ) and an amount of {$2400.00} was rejected due to wrong information. ( Cancelled by XXXX XX/XX/XXXX, and second attempt XX/XX/XXXX rejected and only {$97.00} ) by XXXX XXXX was used for this attempt to receive funds. This is now deemed fraudulent. 

Our legal counsel will continue to pursue until such time as we are fully compensated. We will be in touch with the Secretary of State as needed. 


Kindest Regards, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX On Monday, XX/XX/year> at XXXX PM XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX wrote : Dear XXXX XXXX, XXXX this email finds you well. 

We are currently in the process of investigating this matter. 

Please allow us another XXXX business days to provide you with a comprehensive response. 

If you have any questions in the meantime, please feel free to contact us. 

Kind regards, XXXX XXXX XXXX
